# MOLT DIRECTIVE LIBRARY v1.0.0

## Family role
Directive blocks give explicit action-level commands or orientations.

## Use DIRECTIVE when you want to describe
- what should be done
- what action direction should govern a block bundle
- what command should orient the next layer of execution

## Family relationship
- DIRECTIVE = command/action orientation
- BLUEPRINT = structure
- INSTRUCTION = detailed procedure
- AIM = target outcome
- NEED = requirement constraint
